markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 5. OCCUPATIONAL LICENSING AND BUSINESS REGULATIONS [11100 - 12217]
### Chapter 2. Vehicle Verifiers [11300 - 11312]
##### § 11310

Any person who holds a vehicle verifier’s permit issued before the operative date of this chapter shall comply with the provisions of this chapter within three months after its operative date.

*(Added by Stats. 1975, Ch. 700.)*

subsections.text: Any person who holds a vehicle verifier’s permit issued before the operative date of this chapter shall comply with the provisions of this chapter within three months after its operative date.
